_meta.description: Curated Charlotte/Gastonia NC area food wholesale distributors used as the primary distributor roster. Live Google Places enrichment (when GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY is set) can backfill contact info and union additional specialties, but cannot overwrite name/address/coords. All email domains use *.example so it is unambiguous test data.

distributors.name: Carolina Fresh Produce Co.
distributors.description: Family-owned fresh produce distributor serving Charlotte restaurants since 1987. Daily deliveries from local farms and Atlanta terminal market.

distributors.name: Piedmont Wholesale Foods
distributors.description: Full-service broadline foodservice distributor covering produce, dairy, dry goods, and pantry staples across the Piedmont region.

distributors.name: Queen City Meats
distributors.description: USDA-inspected meat and poultry wholesaler. Antibiotic-free chicken, dry-aged beef, and custom cuts for restaurants.

distributors.name: Southern Harvest Distributors
distributors.description: Regional foodservice distributor specializing in seasonal produce and shelf-stable goods. Twice-weekly delivery routes throughout Mecklenburg County.

distributors.name: Foothills Organic Distribution
distributors.description: Certified-organic produce wholesaler sourcing from small NC and SC farms. Specialty: heirloom greens, root vegetables, and sustainably grown herbs.

distributors.name: Catawba Valley Bakery Supply
distributors.description: Wholesale baker and dry goods distributor. Breads, pastries, flours, sugars, and pantry staples.

distributors.name: Carolina Dairy & Eggs
distributors.description: Dairy and egg distributor sourcing from regional NC dairies. Specialty cheeses, cultured butter, and free-range eggs.

distributors.name: Charlotte Specialty Foods
distributors.description: Import distributor of Mediterranean, Asian, and Latin American specialty ingredients. Olive oils, vinegars, spices, sauces, condiments.

distributors.name: Tidewater Seafood Distributors
distributors.description: Atlantic coast seafood wholesaler. Daily flights of fresh finfish and shellfish from Wilmington, NC and the Outer Banks.

distributors.name: Three Rivers Beverage Co.
distributors.description: Non-alcoholic beverage distributor. Craft sodas, kombuchas, cold-pressed juices, and bottled teas.
